framework.name: EU AI Act Makes Delegation Lineage Legally Required
framework.description: Article 14 of EU AI Act demands humans fully understand and monitor AI operations. Without verifiable delegation chains, compliance collapses. Regulatory forcing function for solving the multi-hop problem.
framework.raw_quote: Under the EU AI Act, traceability and oversight are legal obligations for high-risk systems. Article 14 demands humans fully understand and monitor how AI operates.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
